1879190.name: Meet Cute: Cafe 🐾
1879190.description:
"Meet Cute" is a brand-new series of visual novels focused exclusively on brief love stories. There’s no drama, no overwhelming amounts of text—just you and a date with Alice!

As you stroll through the city streets, your mind is preoccupied with thoughts of work, and the upcoming meeting is all you can think about. Unfortunately, you stumble into a puddle, soaking your entire outfit in dirt. What can you do now? Enter a random café and ask to wash your clothes, of course! That’s how your very own "Meet Cute" occurs, and that’s where it all begins...

Features:

  • A charming meet-cute story

  • HD, fully original artwork

  • Approximately 1 hour of content

  • A relaxing atmosphere

  • A hot waitress!
